Thanks for reaching out. It looks like you have a question.

Before a team member replies, it may be worth checking:

- **[README](../../README.md)** — project overview, setup, and common usage
- **[Open issues](../../issues)** — someone may have asked this before

If those don't answer your question, a team member will follow up here. To help us answer faster, include any relevant context: what you tried, what you expected, and what happened.
